verse.name: v1
verse.lines: All for love the Father gave For only love could make a way All for love the heavens cried For love was crucified

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh how many times, have I broken Your heart But still You forgive if only I ask And how many times, have You heard me pray Draw near to me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Everything I need is You My beginning, my forever Everything I need is You

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Let me sing all for love I will join the angels song Ever holy is the Lord King of Glory, King of all

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: All for a love a Saviour prayed Abba Father have Your way Though they know not what they do Let the Cross draw man to You
